opportunity.title: Show HN: Output.ai - OSS framework we extracted from 500+ production AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The real challenge in production agent systems isn't the routing logic itself—it's handling divergent tool call patterns across different model providers. Most frameworks fail because they assume tool schemas are stable; I'd recommend instrumenting schema drift detection at the orchestration layer rather than re-architecting on every update. Also, consider that "stateless" agent loops often leak context through implicit caching mechanisms that compound token usage unpredictably over time.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider LLM routing and tool orchestration systems for production AI agents, giving me direct experience with the architectural tradeoffs this framework would address.
